languages.text: Reduces the chance of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} by −10%. If any {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} manifest, the wearer gains an additional +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} until the end of combat. Base armour property: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} if the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} is more than 50.
languages.original_text: Reduces the chance of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} by −10%. If any {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} manifest, the wearer gains an additional +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} until the end of combat. Base armour property: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} if the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} is more than 50.

traits.locale_text: Reduces the chance of triggering psychic phenomena by −10%. If any psychic phenomena or perils of the warp manifest, the wielder gets an additional +1 psy rating until the end of combat. Base armour property: +2 deflection if the wielder's Willpower is more than 50.

languages.text: Reduce la probabilidad de provocar {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}fenómenos psíquicos{/g} un −10 %. Si cualquier {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}fatalidad de la disformidad{/g} se manifiesta, el portador gana +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}factor psíquico{/g} hasta el final del combate. Propiedad básica de armadura: +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} si la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} del usuario es superior a 50.

Propiedad básica de armadura: +2 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} si la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} del usuario es superior a 50.

languages.text: 使{g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}灵能异象{/g}的触发率降低10%。若触发{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}亚空间的威胁{/g}，装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}灵能等级{/g}会额外提高2级，效果持续至战斗结束。 基础护甲特性：如果装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}高于50，则获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}。
languages.original_text: Reduces the chance of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} by −10%. traits.locale_text: 使{g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}灵能异象{/g}的触发率降低10%。若触发{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}亚空间的威胁{/g}，装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}灵能等级{/g}会额外提高2级，效果持续至战斗结束。 基础护甲特性：如果装备者的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}高于50，则获得2点{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}。

languages.text: Réduit les chances de déclencher un {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}phénomène psychique{/g} de -10 %. Si des {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}périls du Warp{/g} se manifestent, l'utilisateur gagner +2 d'{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}indice psy{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat. Propriété d'armure de base : +2 à la {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} si la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} de l'utilisateur est supérieure à 50.
languages.original_text: Reduces the chance of triggering {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}psychic phenomena{/g} by −10%. If any {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g} manifest, the wearer gains an additional +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}psy rating{/g} until the end of combat. Base armour property: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} if the wearer's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} is more than 50.

traits.locale_text: Réduit les chances de déclencher un {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}phénomène psychique{/g} de -10 %. Si des {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}périls du Warp{/g} se manifestent, l'utilisateur gagner +2 d'{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}indice psy{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat. Propriété d'armure de base : +2 à la {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} si la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g} de l'utilisateur est supérieure à 50.

languages.text: Reduziert die Chance, dass {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}Psionische Phänomene{/g} ausgelöst wird, um −10 %. Hat sich {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}Gefahren des Warp{/g} manifestiert, erhält der Träger bis zum Ende des Kampfes +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}Psi-Wert{/g}. Grundeigenschaft Rüstung: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}, wenn der Träger mehr als 50 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} hat.

Grundeigenschaft Rüstung: +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}, wenn der Träger mehr als 50 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} hat.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}心霊現象{/g}のトリガーとなる可能性を−10%減少させる。何らかの心霊現象または{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}危険な歪み{/g}が表れた場合、使用者は戦闘が終わるまで{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}超能力レート{/g}に追加で+1を獲得する。 基本アーマー特性：使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}が50以上の場合、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏向{/g}+2。

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}心霊現象{/g}のトリガーとなる可能性を -10%減少させる。何らかの心霊現象または{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}危険な<歪み>{/g}が表れた場合、使用者は戦闘が終わるまで{g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}超能力レート{/g}に追加で +1を獲得する。 基本{g|Encyclopedia:Armour}アーマー{/g}特性：使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}が50以上の場合、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏向{/g} +2

languages.text: Сокращает шанс вызвать {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}пси-морок{/g} на 10%. При появлении {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угроз варпа{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}пси-рейтинг{/g} персонажа увеличивается на 2 до конца боя. Базовое свойство: +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, если значение {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} больше 50.

traits.locale_text: Сокращает шанс вызвать {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}пси-морок{/g} на 10%. При появлении пси-морока или {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угроз варпа{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}пси-рейтинг{/g} персонажа увеличивается на 1 до конца боя. Базовое свойство: +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, если значение {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} больше 50.

Сокращает шанс вызвать {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}пси-морок{/g} на 10%. При появлении пси-морока или {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угроз варпа{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}пси-рейтинг{/g} персонажа увеличивается на 1 до конца боя. Базовое свойство: +2 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, если значение {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воли{/g} больше 50.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:PsychicPhenomena}Ruhsezi fenomeni{/g} tetikleme olasılığını %10 azaltır. Giyen kişi, herhangi bir {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}öteboyut tehlikesi{/g} ortaya çıkarsa ilave +2 {g|Encyclopedia:PsyRating}ruhsezi derecesi{/g} kazanır. Etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Taban zırh özelliği: Giyen kişinin {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} niteliği 50'den yüksekse +2 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g}.
